title: The EMC Open Target & Drug Atlas — a curated, provenance-checked synthesis of public evidence and a triage program for NR4A3-rearranged extraskeletal myxoid chondrosarcoma
description:
A versioned, curated synthesis of identified public evidence on NR4A3-rearranged extraskeletal myxoid chondrosarcoma (EMC) as of July 2026 — NOT a systematic review and not a claim to capture everything known. It integrates the modern patient-derived models, the published drug screens, the clinical reports, public expression, and public dependency databases, with a transparent, author-weighted triage heuristic (not calibrated probabilities). Sources carry graded verification tiers (primary full text, primary abstract, regulatory label, computational reproduction, secondary-source-unconfirmed, pending), and the resource explicitly records what did NOT survive verification. No wet lab was used and nothing has been validated in EMC; no EMC cell line exists in DepMap, so all dependency reads are non-EMC surrogates. Upstream analyses (GEO reprocessing, DepMap, EuropePMC full text, MHC prediction, FDA-label pharmacology) run in separately documented, pinned CI workflows. This record is a citable snapshot of a versioned repository; version, release date, and exact commit are recorded in the release metadata.

Disclosures: Author is independent and unaffiliated. No funding. No conflicts of interest declared. This work was produced with substantial AI assistance (Claude), under the author's direction and review.
notes: LICENSING: original CODE (scripts, build tooling) is Apache-2.0 (repo LICENSE). Original PROSE/DATA authored here is offered under the same terms unless a file states otherwise. THIRD-PARTY material referenced or redistributed (e.g. figures, database excerpts, published values) remains under its own source license/terms and is NOT relicensed by this record; verbatim FDA-label quotes are public-domain US-government text. RELEASE-BLOCKERS before minting a DOI: (1) add the author's real ORCID here and in CITATION.cff (no placeholder); (2) fill version + release date + exact commit; (3) deposit a CURATED atlas subset (see research/atlas/DEPOSIT.md), not the whole repository, and exclude outreach/strategy/scratchpad/unrelated-site files; (4) obtain an independent review + a green build on the tagged commit. See deploy/release-doi.md.
